title: 2020 -Non-Instructional Program Review - Athletics (2) (Part 3)
text:
In Athletics - We serve an average of 242.5 full-time students during the fall semester and 183.4 full-time students in the spring semester. One
of the fastest ways to grow is to keep the students we have. Our department needs help in this area. We feel that an Athletic Specific Academic
advisor would be extremely helpful. Above what our normal advisors do we need a point person that meets with students that are athletes and
have very specific eligibility guidelines and rules. Some one that is knowledgeable about CCCAA, NCAA, and NAIA eligibility rules
